case_title: OLIVIER LAUDE VS. MARY KAY ROSE et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT THORINA ROSE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND IF PLAINTIFF CAN STATE CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT NOT WITHIN THE EXCLUSIVE JURISDICTION OF THE FAMILY COURT. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL IS DIRECTED TO READ AND COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6 (C). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB

ORDER (SUSTAINING DEMURRER)

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT THORINA ROSE'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND BECAUSE AUTHORITY TO ORDER THE SALE OF THE MARITAL HOME IS VESTED IN THE FAMILY COURT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 301/PJB
ORDER RE: DEMURRER
